hero.title: Advanced Research for a Sustainable Future
hero.subtitle1: LLP “National Scientific Center for Seismological Observations and Research” is the leading organization of the Republic of Kazakhstan in the field of seismology, geophysics, and seismic hazard forecasting.
labs1: Laboratory of Geodynamics and Seismic Processes
labs5: Laboratory of Fluid Regime of the Earth's Crust
labs6: Laboratory of Deep Structure of the Earth's Crust
labs8: Laboratory of Seismic Resistance of Buildings and Structures
labs9: Laboratory of Remote Sensing and Cartography
service.sub: Our center provides comprehensive scientific and technical services to government agencies, research institutions, and private clients. We combine advanced technologies with many years of experience.
service1: assessment of seismic risk (engineering and social) for settlements located in seismically hazardous areas of the Republic of Kazakhstan
service2: development of seismic risk maps for settlements located in seismically hazardous areas of the Republic of Kazakhstan
service3: macroseismic surveys of territories to assess the consequences of earthquakes
service4: technical inspection of the reliability and stability of buildings and structures at facilities of the first and second responsibility levels, as well as certification of buildings with the issuance of an expert conclusion
serviceblock1: Contact our specialists to discuss your project requirements and receive a tailored solution.
ft.sbt: Advanced Earth science research, innovative technologies, and international cooperation.

lab.lgsp.subtitle: The laboratory studies geodynamic processes that influence seismic activity in Kazakhstan.

lab.lgsp.directions.1.subtitle: development of maps of modern seismoactive structural heterogeneities

lab.lkpz.title: Laboratory of Comprehensive Earthquake Forecasting
lab.lkpz.subtitle: The laboratory develops methods for medium‑ and short‑term forecasting of strong earthquakes, analyzes anomalous variations of geophysical fields and seismicity parameters to identify earthquake precursors.
